short_description: Shared ipywidgets components for every Dashlibs notebook UI — headers, source pickers, output panels, schema helpers.
long_description: Part of the Dashlibs suite for Databricks. Provides reusable ipywidgets building blocks consumed by dash-dq, dash-synthetic, dash-relate and other dash-* packages so every notebook UI looks and behaves consistently. Install with %pip install dash-uis (PyPI distribution name; the importable module is dashui).
